title: Apollo Node
description: A node in the Apollo knowledge graph. Represents a code entity (file, function, class, etc.) or a document.

id.description: Unique node identifier. Format depends on type: dir::path, file::path, func::path::name, class::path::name, method::path::class::name, var::path::name, import::path::module::Lline, doc::path.

type.description: The kind of entity this node represents.

name.description: Human-readable name of the entity (e.g. function name, file basename, directory name).

path.description: Relative file or directory path from the indexed root.

line_start.description: Starting line number in the source file (1-indexed). Present on function, class, method, and document nodes.

line_end.description: Ending line number in the source file (1-indexed). Present on function, class, method, and document nodes.

source.description: Raw source text of the entity. Present on function, class, and document nodes.

source_md5.description: MD5 hash of the source text. Used for change detection on function nodes.

file_md5.description: MD5 hash of the entire file contents. Present on file nodes for incremental re-indexing.

args.description: Simple list of parameter names. Present on function and method nodes.

params.description: Rich parameter info including defaults and type annotations. Present on function and method nodes.

return_annotation.description: Return type annotation as a string. Present on function and method nodes.

decorators.description: List of decorator names. Present on function and class nodes.

bases.description: List of base class names. Present on class nodes.

parent_class.description: Name of the parent class. Present on method nodes.

module.description: Imported module path. Present on import nodes.

names.description: Specific names imported (from-import). Present on import nodes.

line.description: Line number of the statement. Present on import and variable nodes.

alias.description: Import alias (import x as alias). Present on import nodes.

doc_type.description: Document format (e.g. markdown, json, yaml, csv, text). Present on document nodes.

frontmatter.description: YAML frontmatter metadata extracted from Markdown files. Present on document nodes.

title.description: Document title from frontmatter or first h1. Present on document nodes.

level.description: Heading level (1-6). Present on section nodes.

parent_section.description: Name of the parent heading in the section hierarchy. Present on section nodes.

language.description: Programming language of a fenced code block. Present on code_block nodes.

url.description: Link URL. Present on link nodes.

link_type.description: Link classification. Present on link nodes.

is_image.description: Whether this link is an image reference. Present on link nodes.

headers.description: Table column headers. Present on table nodes.

rows.description: Table data rows. Present on table nodes.

checked.description: Whether a task item is checked. Present on task_item nodes.

embedding.description: Vector embedding of the node's source text. Generated by sentence-transformers.

docstring.description: Docstring extracted from the entity. Present on function, class, method, and document nodes.

is_async.description: Whether this is an async function/method. Present on function and method nodes.

is_nested.description: Whether this function is nested inside another function. Present on function nodes.

is_test.description: Whether this is a test function (name starts with test_). Present on function nodes.

signature_hash.description: MD5 hash of the normalized function signature (name + param names). For finding similar signatures. Present on function and method nodes.

complexity.description: Cyclomatic complexity score. Present on function and method nodes.

loc.description: Lines of code (line_end - line_start + 1). Present on function and method nodes.

context_managers.description: Context manager expressions from with statements. Present on function and method nodes.

exceptions.description: Exception types caught in try/except blocks. Present on function and method nodes.

class_vars.description: Class-level variable assignments. Present on class nodes.

is_dataclass.description: Whether this class has a @dataclass decorator. Present on class nodes.

is_namedtuple.description: Whether this class inherits from NamedTuple. Present on class nodes.

module_docstring.description: Module-level docstring. Present on file nodes.

patterns.description: Detected framework/library patterns (e.g. 'fastapi', 'django'). Present on file nodes.

tag.description: Comment tag (TODO, FIXME, NOTE, HACK, XXX). Present on comment nodes.

text.description: Comment text content. Present on comment nodes.

kind.description: String kind (sql, url, regex). Present on string nodes.

value.description: String or variable value. Present on string and variable nodes.

type_checking.description: Whether this import is inside a TYPE_CHECKING block. Present on import nodes.

annotation.description: Type annotation for a variable. Present on variable nodes.

level.description: Import level (0=absolute, 1=., 2=.., etc.). Present on import nodes.

param.description: Rich parameter descriptor for a function or method argument.

default.description: Default value as a string, or null if no default.

annotation.description: Type annotation as a string, or null if not annotated.

kind.description: Parameter kind: regular arg, *args (vararg), keyword-only (kwonly), or **kwargs (kwarg).
